**Total cars worldwide:** ~1.45 billion (2023)

$$1{,}450{,}000{,}000 \times 0.13 \times 0.007 \times 0.47 \approx \mathbf{620{,}000}$$

Rounding to reflect uncertainty: **~650,000**
